titleStmt.title: SII 10.427: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 427. (A.R. No. 761 of 1922.) ON THE NANDI-PILLAR PLANTED BEFORE THE TEMPLE OF VIŚVĒŚVARA, PEDDA GANJĀM, BAPATLA TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT. Ś. 1192. (Pramōdūta)

summary.p: States that a son of a certain seṭṭi, who was the son of Pinna-Seṭṭi, consecrated the image of Pinnēśvaradēva at Pedda-Gaṁjāmu and made grants of a village and customs duties for the worship of the image. The grants include certain salt pans and the duties include aḍḍavaṭṭa-suṅkamu, and duty on salt sold in seven villages. There was also a gift of 100 sheep for the upkeep of two perpetual lamps. The lands were given free of taxes ari, appanamu, and pullari (grazing tax). The King was Kākatīya Rudradēva-Mahārāja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī svasti śrī śubhasaka
varuṣaṁbulu 1192 yagu
nēṁṭi pramōdōtasaṁvatsara śrā
vaṇa suddha 11 gu . svasti śrīma
nnamahāmaṁḍḍalēśvara kāketī
yarudradēvamahārājulu nu
khasaṁgatāvinōdaṁbuna prithivi rā
jyaṁbu sēyu cuṁḍaṁgānu pinna
seṭṭikoḍku śrīraṁgaseṭṭi tammuṁḍu
diseṭṭi peddagaṁjāna pinnēśvaradēva
ra pratiṣṭasēsi Ādēvaraku Amuda
paḍlaku sātupaḍlaku Aṁgaraṁga
bhōgālaku Iccina Ūru kollimi
ṟulu dēvaraku mikkili paḍlaku A [ ma
du ] caturddasisōmavāralaku caItra
trālaku Iccina Ūppuvāmulu pe
ddagaṁjāna vāmū pinnagaṁjāna vā
mū kaḍakudura vāmū dēvaraku
Akhaṁḍadīpālu 2ki Icina goṟelu
nūṟu 100 Iṁtavaṭṭu kaikoni dīpālaku
camarunaku Ēṁṭanu Āṟu . 6 gujjama
ṁdaḍi māre Iccuvāṁḍu vīri mikkili
goṟelu Ennagallanu Ari Appanamu pu
llari mannana kollimiṟula vritticēnu
nā0 peddagaṁjāmu Aḍḍavaṭṭasuṁka
mu mikkili dīpālaku Iccitimi Ōgi
rāli mīṁdiki nētiki perugunaku I
ccina gōvulu padi 10 pinēśvaradēvaraku
pekkaḍru AvibaliArcanālaku Icci
na Āyamu peddagaṁjāna pinnagaṁjā
na coṁppaṟēla kaḍakudura kanupaṟti dē
varamupalli pāṁdoṟtanu Ēḍuḍla
nu Ēyāranu Uppu vaṭṭinānu
nūṭa ©3 veṭṭivāru dēvara tōṁ
ṭṭa kommu māṟeḍḍi sēsi sagaṁ bā
lu veṭṭi sukha manubhaviṁcu
vāṁḍu
Digital edition of SII 10.427 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
